## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `zsh -n syncpick install`
- [ ] `./tests/test.sh`
- [ ] README/help text updated when behavior changed

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] This change preserves safe defaults, or explains any change to them.
- [ ] No real hosts, usernames, IPs, paths, or sensitive transfer output is included.
